purpose: Critical control system that monitors and controls furnace temperatures across multiple zones, maintaining proper heating profiles and preventing thermal damage

inputs.name: temperature_ramp_rate
inputs.description: Rate of temperature change during heating

inputs.name: alarm_limit_o2
inputs.description: Oxygen flow threshold for alarm activation

inputs.name: lot_id
inputs.description: Identifier for material lot being processed

outputs.name: step_number
outputs.description: Current step number in recipe execution

outputs.name: high_limit_alarm
outputs.description: Alarm status for high temperature limit exceeded

outputs.name: low_limit_alarm
outputs.description: Alarm status for low temperature limit exceeded

outputs.name: evacuation_time
outputs.description: Actual time taken for evacuation step

outputs.name: step_time
outputs.description: Time elapsed in current recipe step

outputs.name: purge_time
outputs.description: Actual time taken for purge step

outputs.name: process_state
outputs.description: Current operational state of the system

outputs.name: backfill_time
outputs.description: Actual time taken for backfill step

states.name: control_accuracy
states.description: Temperature control accuracy degraded by thermal cycling and contamination

states.name: zone_temperature_uniformity
states.description: Temperature uniformity across heating zones degraded by heating element wear

states.name: heat_exchanger_health
states.description: Heat exchanger condition degraded by fouling and thermal stress

states.name: fan_health
states.description: Fan system health degraded by bearing wear and contamination

events.name: temp_power_alarm_zone_3
events.description: Temperature power alarm in zone 3 due to control degradation

events.name: heat_exchanger_failure
events.description: Heat exchanger leaking or clogged requiring replacement

events.name: fan_failure
events.description: Fan out of order requiring maintenance or replacement

parameters.name: control_accuracy_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for control accuracy degradation

parameters.name: uniformity_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for temperature uniformity degradation

parameters.name: heat_exchanger_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for heat exchanger degradation

parameters.name: heat_exchanger_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Heat exchanger health threshold for failure

state_transition_logic: control_accuracy decreases by (1.0 / control_accuracy_timescale) * (temperature_ramp_rate / 10.0) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
zone_temperature_uniformity decreases by (1.0 / uniformity_timescale) * (temperature_ramp_rate / 10.0) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
heat_exchanger_health decreases by (1.0 / heat_exchanger_timescale) * (temperature_ramp_rate / 10.0) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
fan_health decreases by (1.0 / fan_timescale) * (temperature_ramp_rate / 10.0) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
output_logic: zone3_temperature = zone3_target_temp + (1.0 - control_accuracy) * max_temp_deviation * random_variation + (1.0 - zone_temperature_uniformity) * max_temp_deviation * 0.5
high_limit_alarm = true if any zone temperature exceeds target + temp_alarm_threshold * max_temp_deviation
low_limit_alarm = true if any zone temperature below target - temp_alarm_threshold * max_temp_deviation
system_error = true if heat_exchanger_health < heat_exchanger_failure_threshold or fan_health < fan_failure_threshold
alarm_status = high_limit_alarm or low_limit_alarm or system_error
event_logic: temp_power_alarm_zone_3 occurs when (1.0 - control_accuracy) > temp_alarm_threshold or (1.0 - zone_temperature_uniformity) > temp_alarm_threshold
assumptions: Temperature control accuracy degrades with thermal cycling frequency
Zone temperature uniformity degrades independently from control accuracy
Heat exchanger degradation is primarily driven by thermal stress and fouling
Fan degradation follows typical bearing wear patterns
All degradation rates are proportional to temperature ramp rate usage
Zone 3 is most susceptible to temperature non-uniformity
System can continue operation with reduced performance until critical thresholds
